title: Total RNA extraction, cDNA synthesis, and qPCR(S100A6-siRNA)
author: Shanshan Feng

steps_raw.instruction: Wash the cells in a Petri dish. After washing twice with 1 × PBS, add 1 ml of Trizol solution and mix well and pipette into 1.5 ml RNase free EP tube to lyse the cells thoroughly for 5 minutes at room temperature.
Add 200 μL of chloroform to the centrifuge tube and shake vigorously for 30s. centrifuge for 15 minutes at 12,000 rpm at 4 ° C after standing at room temperature for 5 minutes.

Centrifuge the supernatant and transfer to a new RNase free EP tube. Add an equal volume of isopropanol and gently mix thoroughly. Reverse 6-8 times and let stand at room temperature for 10 minutes. 4.Centrifuge at 12,000 rpm for 10 min at 4 ° C and collect RNA pellet.
Wash twice with 75% ethanol and centrifuge at 12,000 rpm for 10 min.
Add an appropriate amount of DEPC water to dissolve the precipitate.For long-term preservation, then placed at -80 ℃.
Determine the concentration of RNA by measuring the absorbance at 260 nm.

8.Prepare the reverse transcription reaction system (20 μl) as follows to synthesize cDNA(Reverse Transcription cDNA kit ( TransGen Biotech , Beijing, China) ) ①The first step(65℃ 5min, then immediate cooling on the ice 2min) Total RNA 50ng-5ug Oligo（dT）18 Primer（0.5ug/ul） 0.5ul Random Primer（0.1ug/ul） 0.5ul ②The second step(25℃ 10 min, 42℃ 15 min, 85℃ 5 seconds.) 2×TS Reaction Mix 10ul RT/RI Enzyme Mix 1ul gDNA Remover 1ul RNase-free Water add up to 20 μl

Prepare the following qPCR system (20 μl) on ice(SYBR® Select Master Mix (Life Technologies, USA)) cDNA mixture 1 μl SYBR® Select Master Mix（2x） 10ul upstream primer (10 mM) 1 μl downstream primer (10 mM) 1 μl RNase free water add up to 20 μl 10.Set up the qPCR reaction procedure as described below: Step 1 50℃ 2min Step 2 95℃ 2 minutes 95℃ 15 seconds 60℃ 1 minutes 60℃ 10 seconds 40 Cycles in Step 2 Step 3 72℃ 5 minutes Step 4 4℃ hold
Calculate relative gene expression by comparison of the CT value of the gene of interest with that of GAPDH which ia an internal control.
